name: Beef in Walnut Sauce (Lagado)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge meat in seasoned flour; shake off excess.
2. Heat oil in a large frying pan; brown meat well. Transfer to a crockery pot.
3. Pour water into the frying pan to loosen drippings. Add to the crockery pot with tomato sauce, garlic, and vinegar.
4. Place cinnamon stick, cloves, and allspice in a tea ball or cheesecloth.
5. Add to the pot. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours, or until very tender. If necessary, reduce pan juices.
6. Add walnuts and lemon juice. Heat to serving temperature.
7. Serve over buttered toast. Makes 12 servings.
